title: Candace Owens sparks backlash with theory tying Charlie Kirk’s death to Middle East tensions
summary_full: Candace Owens has sparked controversy by claiming Charlie Kirk was removed because he opposed U.S. involvement in a potential war with Iran. She alleged his death was part of a sophisticated plan meant to shift public support toward Israel and invoked Donald Trump’s foreign policy stance. Her theory remains unproven and has drawn significant criticism and debate.
